caption:
Another night at the archives 🔥.

The campus is quiet, just the hum of my heels on the marble floor. I adjusted my blazer, feeling the silk of my blouse against my skin. He walked in late, the scent of ink and danger in the air... his eyes locked on mine with an intensity that made my breath hitch. We moved to the desk where I sat, the pencil skirt hugging my thighs, the blazer falling open to reveal the red silk underneath. The grading papers were scattered, forgotten as the air grew heavy between us. He leaned in close, his voice a low rumble that vibrated through the quiet room. 

My heart raced as he stepped closer, the scent of his cologne mingling with the old paper smell. He sat on the edge of the desk, the leather creaking under his weight. My gaze dropped to his chest, then back up to those dark eyes that seemed to burn holes into my soul.

"Private tutoring?" he whispered, a smirk playing on his lips. 

I smiled, my fingers tracing the edge of my skirt. "Something much more private," I replied, leaning back into the chair, feeling the cool wood against my back. The night is young, and the lecture hall is empty. #UniversityTeacher #AcademicLife #ProfessorVibes #HotTeacher #CampusDiaries 🔥📚✨
